slides.heading: Create, fill, and read a file
slides.body:
**`touch`** creates an empty file.

**`>`** redirects text into a file (overwriting).

**`cat`** prints a file to the terminal.
bullets: Stay in `/home/student/projects` — same folder as the navigation step

slides.heading: Activity
slides.body:
```bash
touch notes.txt
echo hello linux > notes.txt
ls
cat notes.txt
```
bullets: Visualizer should show `notes.txt`; `cat` should print `hello linux`
